claim_text: Same-day MVRV changes strongly overlap with BTC returns and are treated as measurement mechanics.
method: same-interval identity audit and HAC same-day diagnostic
estimate_summary: corr(BTC return, d-log MVRV)=0.9966; R2=0.9932; median abs residual / median abs BTC return=1.14e-07
uncertainty_summary: Diagnostic only; same-day MVRV is excluded from primary exposure models.
robustness_checks: Identity residual scale, residual quantiles, and lagged state summaries.
limitations: Source conventions and realized-cap updates affect residual.

claim_text: Contemporaneous TradFi exposure is evaluated on synchronized business-date and Friday panels.
exposure_or_state: equity, volatility, dollar, rate, and gold exposures
method: same-support HAC OLS drop-block delta R-squared
estimate_summary: BTC equity block pre-BTC-ETF delta R2=0.0249 (n=797) vs BTC-ETF-era delta R2=0.0884 (n=436); ETH equity block pre-BTC-ETF delta R2=0.0193 (n=797) vs BTC-ETF-era delta R2=0.1076 (n=436); period comparison, not ETF effect
robustness_checks: Business-date daily returns, Friday weekly returns, VIF, ridge, FDR, and local-window correlation distributions.
limitations: Period splits are descriptive and not causal ETF identification.

claim_text: Crypto-native liquidity, sentiment, funding, and scaled OI are reported as lagged-state associations.
exposure_or_state: stablecoin supply, valuation-sensitive TVL, Fear & Greed, funding, OI/market-cap, exchange flow
estimate_summary: BTC daily lagged-state full R2=0.0064, n=2263; ETH daily lagged-state full R2=0.0055, n=2263
uncertainty_summary: HAC/FDR diagnostics; weekly models require nonzero accepted samples.
robustness_checks: Sunday-ended crypto weekly panel and daily lagged-state panel.
limitations: USD TVL and USD/notional OI can embed price content.

claim_text: ETF flow intensity is separated into lag 0 and lag 1 associations on ETF trading dates.
exposure_or_state: ETF flow intensity, cumulative flow / lagged market cap
frequency: ETF trading daily; Friday weekly model rows
method: correlation grid, absorption ratios, ETF-era augmented same-support OLS
estimate_summary: BTC lag0 return corr=0.379 (n=820) vs lag1=0.049 (n=819); ETH lag0 return corr=0.226 (n=627) vs lag1=0.086 (n=626)
uncertainty_summary: Short samples and reporting timing caveats.
robustness_checks: Lag 0 and lag 1 flow intensity are separate columns; no zero-imputation for holidays.
limitations: ETF flow timing may be reported after market close.

claim_text: Leverage and liquidation variables are treated as stress-state diagnostics with interpretable denominators.
exposure_or_state: funding, OI/market-cap, leverage ratio, liquidations / lagged OI and market cap
method: state quintiles, lagged logit, top liquidation event windows
estimate_summary: Q1 low tail-day rate=7.06% (n=453); Q3 tail-day rate=4.20% (n=452); Q5 high tail-day rate=7.73% (n=453); read as U-shaped state pattern
uncertainty_summary: Class-balance diagnostics; event responses separated from same-day signatures.
robustness_checks: Liquidation ratios in percent of lagged OI or basis points of lagged market cap.
limitations: Exchange coverage and liquidation reporting conventions.

claim_text: Stablecoin supply is a cleaner liquidity-state proxy; raw USD TVL is valuation-sensitive.
exposure_or_state: stablecoin supply growth, valuation-sensitive DeFi TVL growth
method: weekly regime summaries and contamination audit correlations
estimate_summary: BTC same-week raw USD TVL corr=0.679 (n=327); ETH same-week raw USD TVL corr=0.761 (n=327); TVL labeled valuation-sensitive
robustness_checks: Sunday-ended weekly transformations and explicit TVL price-content audit.
limitations: No price-adjusted TVL source is available in the local data.

claim_text: Monthly PIT snapshots support composition, concentration, and turnover evidence.
exposure_or_state: PIT top-100 slices from top-200 snapshots
method: market-cap shares, HHI, top-share concentration, entries/exits
robustness_checks: Shares sum within month; taxonomy and canonical IDs audited.
limitations: No daily PIT constituent OHLCV for historical performance.

claim_text: Selected-major risk comparisons are coverage-aware and use canonical local IDs.
estimate_summary: 10 assets comparable from 2024-11-30 to 2026-06-16; HYPE max-coverage n=564
uncertainty_summary: Coverage windows differ; HYPE is short-history.
limitations: Current-source cohort coverage begins mostly in 2023.

claim_text: Configured BTC/ETH event windows are empirical placebo-window tests, not bootstrap causal inference.
method: post +1 through +10 return and non-overlapping placebo windows
estimate_summary: BTC,ETH event windows use block size=10; median eligible placebo windows=2007; convention +1 through +10
uncertainty_summary: Small event count; placebo windows exclude registered-event overlaps.
robustness_checks: Actual and placebo windows use the same block size and convention.

claim_text: True point-in-time historical altseason return analysis remains deferred.
exposure_or_state: historical PIT constituent daily OHLCV and market cap
estimate_summary: Deferred: monthly PIT snapshots do not include daily constituent return histories.
robustness_checks: Public checker and evidence ledger prevent current-cohort overclaiming.
